description: Extend the Zod config schema with `presets: Record<string, Preset>` where Preset matches the built-in shape ({ focus, depth, checklist, description }). Custom presets override built-ins with the same name. Add `codex-claude-bridge presets` list subcommand and include custom presets in --help and "unknown preset" error output. Acceptance: custom preset defined in .reviewbridge.json resolves and overrides any built-in with the same key; list subcommand prints built-ins and custom together.
title: Custom presets via .reviewbridge.json
